case_title: CRUZ, MERCEDES VS ASPILLERA, CARLOTA N.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY CRUZ, MERCEDES AS TO DEFENDANT ASPILLERA, CARLOTA N. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-02-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ASPILLERA, CARLOTA N.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRUZ, MERCEDES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ASPILLERA, CARLOTA N. $600.00 PRINCIPAL, $82.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $682.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ASPILLERA, CARLOTA N.
